daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but restless—like you're ready to shake things up. Trust that magnetic pull toward something new. The universe is nudging you toward authenticity today.
daily.love: Your heart's speaking louder than usual. Whether you're single or coupled up, vulnerability hits different right now. Let someone see the real you—it's your superpower.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing and your creative confidence is peaked. This is your moment to pitch, propose, or pivot. Your follow-through energy is immaculate; use it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Energy flows where intention goes, so be intentional with your self-care.
